title: Feasibility and Local Perceptions About Treated Wastewater Reuse for Irrigation: Insights from the Prato Circular City Framework (Italy)
description: SpeakForWater Episode 4: Feasibility and Local Perceptions About Treated Wastewater Reuse for Irrigation: Insights from the Prato Circular City Framework (Italy). A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
